block_03: Fundamental traders believe that financial and political news play an important role in trading, and the first minutes after an important release are the most critical.
block_04: With Quadcode Markets’ News & Calendars, you won’t miss meaningful headlines anymore — let’s see how it works.
block_06: Stay updated on the latest economic events and earnings forecasts using the Quadcode Markets’ Newsfeed, Economic & Earnings Calendars.
block_07: The Calendar categorizes all events based on their potential impact on the market, and provides information on their past, predicted, and actual values.*
block_08: *Information regarding past performance is not a reliable indicator of future performance and forecasts are not a reliable indicator of future performance.
block_10: To learn how the economic calendar works, click on the VIDEO TUTORIALS section in the sidebar and watch the video “How to use the calendar”.
block_14: Be informed of any price changes immediately following the news release. Depending on whether the actual levels surpass or fall below the predictable levels, the corresponding asset price may increase or decrease accordingly.
block_16: You may keep a close eye on the asset's price movement after the news release and be alert for any signs of a reversal candle formation. Corrective trends could present a potential trading opportunity according to your trading approach.
block_17: Take advantage of market-moving events and make better-informed decisions
